name: Chocolate Passion Dessert
recipeIngredient: 2 packages COOL WHIP Chocolate Non-Dairy Whipped Topping, thawed (8 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the brownies into 1/2 inch cubes.
2. Layer in a 3-quart serving bowl: half of the brownies, 1 cup of sliced strawberries, one sliced banana, and one tub of whipped topping.
3. Repeat the layers. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
